name: Delete ROSAMachinePool
description: Delete a machine pool from an existing ROSA HCP cluster by removing the MachinePool + ROSAMachinePool pair

playbooks.name: Delete Machine Pool
playbooks.description: Deletes the MachinePool and ROSAMachinePool resources and waits for full removal

documentation.overview: This test suite deletes a machine pool from an existing ROSA HCP cluster. It removes both the CAPI MachinePool and the ROSAMachinePool infrastructure resource, then waits for the resources to be fully cleaned up.
prerequisites: An existing ROSA HCP cluster with the target machine pool
MCE/ACM hub cluster with CAPI/CAPA configured

quick_start.description: Deletes the specified machine pool and waits for cleanup

customization.pool_name: Name of the machine pool to delete (required)

expected_results: ROSA decommissions worker nodes in AWS
Resources fully removed from the namespace (max wait: 15 minutes)
